task_description: Convert Pine Script v6 STX Edge indicator (2293 lines) to MT5 MQL5 with ALL visual elements preserved. Split into 10 parts, each committed and pushed to GitHub. The MT5 version must show the SAME visual output - zone boxes (blue/green/red rectangles), HCS boxes (orange/blue), LAOL lines (dashed with labels), RR boxes (red SL, green TP), border style changes (dashed->solid on retest), and all alerts.
